backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealer backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media, visitor stats, etc.), stable state, and type definitions, while mixing in storage, authorization, and access control modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file at the frontend root level.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang frontend app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers, and protects admin routes with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format and submitting create/update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component that displays a list of admin users with their principal ID, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid and returning the selected asset ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, using confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with copy-ID and delete actions, generating blob URLs from canister-stored data and validating delegation identity before deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking and delegation identity/actor validation before uploading.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, and edit/delete actions including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, star rating, and edit/delete action buttons, delegating delete handling to the parent.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages, converting bigint URL/count pairs into chart-friendly data with truncated display URLs. Shows a skeleton loader while loading and an empty state message when no data is available.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart displaying visitor trends over the last 30 days, converting bigint timestamp/count pairs into date-labeled data points. Handles loading and empty states with a skeleton and placeholder message respectively.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity delegation validity, syncs or clears the auth token in localStorage, and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of five latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages using TanStack Router. Each item is rendered as a clickable button with a file icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: A fixed bottom navigation bar with four action buttons: Call, WhatsApp, credit simulation link, and a menu toggle that shows a dropdown of site navigation links. Handles outside-click dismissal of the dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a commercial vehicle variant, defaulting to the first variant and notifying the parent component of selection changes via a callback.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner image (loaded from media assets for authenticated users or falling back to a static asset) with an overlay containing a WhatsApp contact button. WhatsApp number and banner image are sourced from website settings.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with dealer contact info, social media links, visitor stats, and dynamic content sourced from website settings with fallback defaults. Auto-refreshes visitor statistics every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Renders a page-specific hero banner with a title, icon, background color, and subtitle determined by the current pathname. Adjusts text color for Mobil Niaga pages to black instead of white.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel section of up to 8 family car (Mobil Keluarga) vehicle cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
Displays a carousel section of up to 8 commercial vehicle (Mobil Niaga) cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the hero banner section using a configurable image from website settings (authenticated users) or a fallback static image, overlaid with the site name and tagline.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with the site logo, desktop menu links, and a collapsible mobile menu that closes on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle product, displaying counts and triggering the native Web Share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicle cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: A search input section that redirects users to the family car listing page with a query parameter when they submit a search.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with two paragraphs describing the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback when the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price, and a link to its detail page.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language string constants for UI labels, validation messages, and success/error/confirmation messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, initializing admin access control when authenticated and invalidating dependent queries on actor change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches admin dashboard statistics from the backend actor, currently returning zeroed default values as the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting admin users via the backend actor, using `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations and publish-toggling on blog posts; all mutation and query functions are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories; all backend calls are stubbed with warnings since the backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form; the backend call is stubbed and the submission is only logged to the console.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting contact submissions; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the data to the console.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting credit simulations; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status to child components via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets via the backend actor, with progress callback support on upload.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for getting and mutating product like/share counts; all backend calls are stubbed, and a combined `useProductInteractions` hook is exported for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed out with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with its catalog, both returning empty/null stubs as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a single React Query hook to fetch website settings from the backend actor, returning null on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials (get, create, update, delete), all stubbed out with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete, toggle publish, get catalog), all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch visitor stats (active), visitor trend, and page views (both disabled pending backend implementation).
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that is now a no-op, with tracking responsibility moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, using protected calls for mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout component with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears query cache and redirects to login.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout component that wraps pages with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
Admin page for managing admin users, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via a list and dialog component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog articles, allowing add and edit via a dialog and invalidating the blogPosts query cache on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles that displays a notice that the feature is not yet fully implemented.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that fetches and displays all credit simulation submissions in a sortable table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard showing stat cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media, and visitors, plus a whoAmI debug section to verify the caller's principal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page that fetches and displays incoming contact/lead submissions sorted by timestamp in a table.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin media manager page with an upload zone and asset grid, invalidating the mediaAssets cache after a successful upload.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with add and edit functionality via a list and dialog component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions, supporting add and edit operations through a list and dialog component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials, providing UI to add, edit, and delete testimonials with a confirmation dialog before deletion.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard page displaying real-time visitor statistics (totals, daily, weekly, monthly, online now) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, plus trend and top-pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for editing website settings (site name, contact info, social links, banner images) with form state synced from backend and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, syncs auth tokens on login, and includes a debug whoAmI button to verify the backend principal.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components including banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder public page for a blog article detail view, displaying an under-development message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder public page for the blog list, displaying an under-development message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form collecting visitor details (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) and submitting via the useContactForm hook.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a family car, showing vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, specs, features tabs, and interaction buttons, resolved by slug from the catalog data.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family cars, fetching vehicle catalogs and rendering up to 8 vehicles as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, displaying up to 8 vehicles in a grid with the category name as a heading.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Detail page for a commercial vehicle, displaying its image, price, variant selector, specs, and features based on a URL slug. Supports variant selection with dynamic price updates and action buttons for sales contact, credit simulation, and brochure download.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page for commercial vehicles showing three category cards (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) that navigate to their respective category routes.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions, displaying a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page where users input personal details, select a vehicle, and enter down payment and tenor to calculate and submit an estimated monthly installment.
Placeholder page for customer testimonials, displaying a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for frontend use that mirror backend types, covering entities such as Vehicle, Variant, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, and VisitorStats.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Centralized API client utility that wraps ICP canister calls with pre-call authentication validation, authorization error handling, and session management helpers.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and for checking MIME type categories (image or PDF).
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single function that calculates a monthly loan installment using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: localStorage utility for persisting ICP Internet Identity session state, including saving, retrieving, expiry-checking, and clearing the authenticated principal ID.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Form validation helpers (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) plus a delegation identity validator that checks for anonymous principals and expired/expiring ICP sessions.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Utility functions for visitor analytics including UUID-based session ID generation, device/browser detection, bot detection, and admin route identification.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang backend admin app, recording two pending feature requests to add a temporary forceSetMeAsSuperAdmin function to the Motoko backend.
